indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and positioning during yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can enhance the mood and focus during yoga practice.

indicators.name: Towel on counter
indicators.rationale: A towel can be used to wipe sweat or for other purposes during yoga.

indicators.name: No furniture
indicators.rationale: The absence of furniture allows for more freedom of movement but also means there is less support for the practice.

reasoning_summary: The space is suitable for yoga and stretching due to its open layout and natural lighting, but lacks furniture support.
